extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the left side mirror of their car is broken.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the left side mirror of a red car, which is severely broken and damaged.
The image shows a close-up of a red car's side mirror, which appears to be intact and undamaged.

result.user_claim: Customer: Mera left side mirror toot gaya hai. | Support: Sirf left mirror claim hai? | Customer: Haan, left side mirror broken hai. | Support: Door ya bumper damage bhi hai? | Customer: Nahi, only left side mirror.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed side_mirror with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed side_mirror with visible broken_part. Supporting images: img_1.
